User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user balance, wins, and other profile data.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

username.description: User's display name or Telegram handle.

avatar.description: URL to the user's profile image.

completedTasks.description: List of IDs for completed tasks.

referralCode.description: Unique referral code for the user.

referredBy.description: UID of the user who referred this user.

Game.title: Game Session
Game.description: Stores current or past game session data.

players.description: List of player objects in the current game.
